name: Morgantown Miniature Golf & Chip-N-Putt
about: Morgantown Miniature Golf & Chip-N-Putt is an outdoor recreation facility featuring miniature golf, a Chip-N-Putt course, and batting cages. The venue offers a variety of attractions, including an 18-hole miniature golf course with fun obstacles and water features, a 9-hole Chip-N-Putt course with holes between 20-50 yards, and 5 batting cage stations for softball and baseball. The establishment is described as a family-friendly location perfect for groups, friends, and date nights, providing a laid-back atmosphere with classic outdoor fun. They offer party packages, pavilion rentals, and the opportunity to win free golf with a hole-in-one on the final mini golf hole.
why_golfers_like_it: Variety of attractions including both mini golf and batting cages
Outdoor atmosphere with fresh air and a relaxed vibe
All-in-one fun spot suitable for different skill levels and ages
Unique promotions like winning free golf for a year with a hole-in-one
Family-friendly environment suitable for group outings and parties

food_and_drink.notes: Outside food and drinks are not allowed.

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides necessary equipment; helmets and bats are provided for the batting cages, and the courses require standard golf clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The exact time for an 18-hole round is not specified on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is explicitly described as family-friendly and suitable for all ages, including children.
